ButterflyBlossomPayout.PayoutDesc1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spin symbol.
ButterflyBlossomPayout.PayoutDesc2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

ButterflyBlossomRules.Rule1: Butterfly Blossom is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring sticky Wild symbols and free spins with increasing multiplier.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of  %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

ButterflyBlossomRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
ButterflyBlossomRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
ButterflyBlossomRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

ButterflyBlossomMultiplier.MultiplierExplain1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
ButterflyBlossomMultiplier.MultiplierExplain2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
ButterflyBlossomMultiplier.MultiplierExplain3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
ButterflyBlossomMultiplier.MultiplierExplain4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.

ButterflyBlossomStickyWild.StickyWildExplain1: During any spin, one or more Caterpillar Wild symbol may appear on the reels.
ButterflyBlossomStickyWild.StickyWildExplain2: If a Caterpillar Wild symbol is involved in a win, the Caterpillar Wild symbol will not destroy itself in the next round and will be transformed into a Cocoon Wild symbol.
ButterflyBlossomStickyWild.StickyWildExplain3: If a Cocoon Wild symbol is involved in a win, the Cocoon Wild symbol will not destroy itself in the next round and will be transformed into a Butterfly Wild symbol.
ButterflyBlossomStickyWild.StickyWildExplain4: If a Butterfly Wild symbol is involved in a win, the Butterfly Wild symbol will add +5 to the rightmost multiplier and disappear in the next round.

ButterflyBlossomFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3 Free Spin symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Free Spin symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
ButterflyBlossomFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: During the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers above the reels will be increased to x3, x6, x9 and x15 respectively.
ButterflyBlossomFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: 2 Free Spin symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 3 more free spins.
